name: Secondary Folder Tree
description: A second folder tree, slid in from the right of TEDI's workspace and mutual-exclusive with the AI Agent sidebar. Pin any folder on disk via the per-extension default path setting, expand subdirectories on click, double-click a file to emit an `open-path` event. Built on TEDI's generic right-panel hook (`registerPanelRenderer`) — drops in next to the AI Agent button without core changes.
author: IlhamRiski - ilhamriski.com

settings.label: Default folder
settings.description: Absolute path that the panel opens to. Leave empty to start at the active workspace folder.

settings.label: Open on startup
settings.description: When enabled, the secondary tree opens automatically the first time TEDI launches each session.
